enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog from Boulder on February 17, 2016, reflecting on his time away from YouTube and modern news. He discusses immersing himself in historical/past voices through audio content and shares his excitement about recently starting to follow news again via text-to-speech on his computer.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deliberately avoided modern news to focus on historical perspectives and past thinkers
excited to return to making video logs after a long break
newly enthusiastic about having the computer read news articles aloud

claims.claim: Kyle is very excited about doing video logs again.

transcript.text: Hello, YouTube world. So, this is V-log that evening Boulder. What day? Wednesday, February 17th of 2016. Very, very, very excited about doing the video logs again.

I'm like, I'm still, you know, I'm like at that point where I'm like, ah, why? Why hasn't I been doing it, you know? Like, you turn around, all of a sudden everybody's doing it. It's like, whoa. Yeah, I've been out of the loop on YouTube, you know? I only watched like YouTube 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2011. And then like by 12, you know, especially now I don't listen to anything.

And I think, I mean, maybe even, the only thing I listened to was Young Turks. I started doing the Kyle Kalinsky. And then just recently, I started listening to, like today was the first day, Huffington Post, where you have the computer read the Huffington Post articles to you.

And I haven't been paying attention to modern news at all because I felt like it kind of would take away from my time of audio books and stuff. But I mean, I don't understand. I know. It's like, what?

I can't believe it's too much time, but you know, this long, but sometimes, you know, you have to block certain things out in order to understand other things, you know, like you have to maybe block out the current world, you know?

Like maybe I wanted to just block out the modern current world so that I could focus on the past world so much so that when I start paying attention to the current world more, I can look at it from like a foreigner's perspective, a past world perspective as though I was, you know, because most of the people I've been listening to in my ears above their voices are long go past time, you know?

And I don't talk to people in the real world, I don't talk to people in the real world, really. So it's like, all my friends are the olden times and so I'm like, time warp into 2015, you know? It's really trippy. So, yeah, that's so trippy, I even lost my train of thought.

Um, so what I'm doing now is working on my work. Yeah, I just smoked a whole bunch of weed. So I was working all day long and on some complicated parts around, like, you know, Boulder Creek and 13th and stuff.

Um, and, um, and, um, and I wasn't at 100% today. You know, I was still feeling kind of bad, like hungry all the time. Um, yeah, it's one in the morning now, so I finally got, I'm ready to do the talking. It's the best time for me to do the talking. Um, and, uh, so I'm going to start doing the, um,
Oh, yeah, news. News, news, news, news. I'm super excited because I listened to the news articles today with my computer reading it to me for the first time. I'm like, whoop.
Had it take so long for me to do this. Crazy. But it's cool. I'm excited to start it up now. Um, so, um,
Um, and do more videos and, uh, yeah, dude, it later on. I'll, maybe my money will go boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom.
And I'll be okay. So, yeah, that's enough to, only, how many long time can I?
